name: Core Features Split
prompt_context: A central services/features component displaying exactly 4 key features wrapped around a vertical portrait image. INSTRUCTION: You MUST dynamically generate the features based on the provided project description and the answers to the static questions. Extract the 4 most compelling unique value propositions or services offered by the project.

content_schema.h2: string (Main heading summarizing the features based on the project data, max 10 words)
content_schema.description: string (Short description under the heading emphasizing the project's value, max 20 words)
content_schema.center_image: string (A beautiful vertical portrait format image URL)

features.title: string (Dynamic feature name derived from project details)
features.description: string (Dynamic feature brief description derived from project data)
features.icon: string (One of: BarChart, Edit, Smartphone, Shield, Zap, Globe)

image_hints: Select a sophisticated portrait image, preferably a person representing the target demographic or a crisp product shot. Should have a clean, balanced background.
